description: Draft → Submitted → Approved workflow exported as IEEE 1849-2016 XES XML. Asserts the output parses as well-formed XML via quick_xml::Reader, contains exactly one <trace>, and emits one <event> per Facts-tier provenance record, each carrying concept:name and time:timestamp. Asserts §5.5/§6.3 actor type as org:group (emitted when actor_type is set — OnEntry events without an actor therefore omit it), §6.3 custom lifecycle attribute (wos:lifecycleState present, standard lifecycle:transition absent), §6.3 per-event repeated wos:input / wos:output attributes (NOT comma-joined) on state-transition events, §6.3 wos:inputDigest / wos:outputDigest (sha256 hex, 64 chars), and the §6.3 trace-level wos:definitionVersion. Kernel and event sequence are defined once in tests/export_conformance.rs (shared_workflow_kernel / shared_workflow_events).
